---
title: "Beatrice Braithwaite Batty"
---

## Beatrice Braithwaite Batty

**Dates:** (1833-1893)

**Maiden name:** (Stebbing)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. Henry Stebbing, her marriage (24 July 1860) to the Rev. Robert Braithwaite Batty, elder son of the late Lieut-Col Robert Batty, Grenadier Guards, was announced in <i>The Times</i> (26 July 1860).  She appears to have been sister-in-law to Johanna Batty.  According to her obituary <i>The Times</i> (2 May 1933) her husband went as a missionary to India and died almost immediately. Some autobiographical and other MSS of hers are in the Bodleian Library, Oxford.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
